name: McpVanguard Proxy
description: Cloud-Native Security Gateway for MCP Agents (SSE Bridge).

MCP_SERVER_COMMAND.description: The command to run your target MCP server. e.g. 'npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /app'

VANGUARD_VEX_URL.description: The endpoint for the VEX Protocol Flight Recorder (e.g., https://vex-api.up.railway.app/api/v1)

VANGUARD_VEX_KEY.description: The JWT Key for your VEX Auditor agent

OLLAMA_API_BASE.description: URL for remote Ollama/OpenAI intent scoring (if not running locally)

VANGUARD_REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection string for L3 Stateful Behavioral blocking

VANGUARD_DISABLE_UVLOOP.description: Set to 1 to disable uvloop if encountering segmentation faults during subprocess creation
